overview.summary: Model score 7 vs user score 4 (gap 3). Primary drivers: Environmental Noise / Speech, Mental Readiness. Agreement classification: MODEL_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Short observation window likely caused the model to smooth over transient distractions that the user perceived strongly.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio trend captured noise profile correctly, but distraction weighting should increase when speech overlaps sustained ambient noise.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals were partially informative; next run should treat missing HR windows as uncertainty rather than neutral evidence.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Frequent posture changes should reduce focus confidence unless corroborated by improved audio and vitals.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS changes should trigger context shift checks, but not directly drive concentration score changes.

judgment_policy_next_run: Cap confidence when biometrics are missing or sparse during high-noise intervals.
Add readiness-context interaction terms for activity and environment mismatch.
